title: RestaRules Agent Venue Rules
description: Machine-readable conduct and consent rules for AI agent interactions with a restaurant venue. Schema v0.1.

schema_version.description: Version of the RestaRules schema this file conforms to.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date when this rules file was last edited (YYYY-MM-DD).

effective_at.description: ISO 8601 date when these rules take effect (YYYY-MM-DD). May differ from last_updated if published in advance.

default_policy.description: What agents should assume for any capability not explicitly addressed in this file.

disclosure_required.description: Whether AI agents must identify themselves before interacting with the venue.

enabled.description: If true, the agent must disclose that it is an AI before making any request.

phrasing.description: Optional suggested phrasing for the disclosure. Informational, not prescriptive.

allowed_channels.description: Communication channels the venue permits AI agents to use.

rate_limits.description: Rate limits on how frequently a single agent may perform specific actions at this venue.

limit.description: Maximum number of attempts allowed within the time window.

window_unit.description: Time unit for the rate limit window.

window_value.description: Number of window_units that define the rate limit period.

human_escalation_required.description: Conditions under which the agent must hand off to a human instead of proceeding autonomously.

party_size_auto_max.description: Maximum party size an agent may book without human confirmation. Parties larger than this require human escalation.

conditions.description: Named conditions that always require human escalation.

third_party_restrictions.description: Rules governing whether bookings can be resold, transferred, or made on behalf of unverified parties.

no_resale.description: If true, reservations made through this venue may not be resold.

no_transfer.description: If true, reservations may not be transferred to a different party.

identity_bound_booking.description: If true, the reservation is bound to the identity provided at booking time.

complaint_endpoint.description: URL where agent misbehavior can be reported to the venue.
